# Assessment Overview

This directory contains the supplemental assessment documents generated for the versioned report.

- **[Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md)** — High-level application layers and component relationships.
- **[Dependency Map](dependency-map.md)** — Declared external dependencies grouped by functional category.
- **[API & Service Communication Contracts](api-service-contracts.md)** — HTTP endpoints, contracts, and synchronous communication patterns.
- **[Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](data-architecture.md)** — Database usage, entity model, and repository responsibilities.
- **[Configuration & Externalized Settings Inventory](configuration-inventory.md)** — Profiles, properties, secrets handling, and runtime configuration sources.
- **[Core Business Workflows](business-workflows.md)** — Primary user workflows, business rules, and process flow.
